title: Reaper's Descendant
description: A mod that focuses on snowballing into Death Incarnate.
body:
# "I will guide you, but you do the work." Sell your soul to the **Cult of Death** and follow the footsteps of the old world to gain god-like strength. This mod centralizes around the _Reaper's Scythes_, they are the primary weapons and tools to your path of death. Reap the souls of innocents and use their souls to empower yourself onward towards **His** status, or use them up to gain tempoary boosts in combat. The Scythes are snowball weapons! They start off bad, and you have to gain power! Patience. Additions:
Spoiler

Scythes

  • Old Reaper's Scythe - "Passed down, generation after generation"
![glowing white purple scythe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/70ebacebe23a0ed3a67807e9f4f2b3a40e54f754.png)

Your first and most important tool in your path! !!You need to get it through the Death Certificate before wielding!! Slay your enemies and innocents to reap their souls for buffs and an ability at 25: Rejuvinate!

Rejuvinate!: Use 10% of your souls to gain Absorption and Saturation. Stacks and resets time, so go wild!

  • Prime Reaper's Scythe - "Trust is bestowed, not bought"
![Glowing white/yellow blue scythe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e7f0ae418d3740e86ea33905c34e2d3fdc2ae6f1.png)

By killing four Withers and using 150 souls - you did it! I'm not going to ask how or even why, but congrats! Buffs are better and an even better ability at 100 souls: Reap!

Reap!: Right-click to use 5% of your souls to afflict all entities in a 7 block radius with Reap effect, slowly reaping their soul and withering them from the inside. For each entity afflicted, gain a level of Absorption and Saturation. And players give two levels, great for PvP!

Tools

  • New World Reaper's Reforger - "Old knowledge stays within footsteps"
![Big hammer with purple and blue detailing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b134ec2f83da6f69b44947b4a0d740f645048b1a.png)

Tool used by the Old World's Cult of Death to forge the first ever Reaper's Scythe! Used to forge the Prime Reaper's Scythe on the Starred Reorger.

  • Bloodletting Knife - "Sacrifices are necessary on the path to the top"
![curvy dagger](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0d61bcb47359d6b9b441d8bb3360d9bd1a4f99aa.png)

Used on the Death Shrine Confirmation to gain trust with the Cult of Death.

Locations

  • Death Shrine - "Old World is history, and history is never-ending"
![ intricate and detailed block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cab11ea0a2bcdfaae219e7e2b13a1c57af9bb388.png)

The Cult of Death was founded in the Soulsand Valley, and all of their shrines and churces can be found there.

Here lies the Death Shrine Confirmation. Used in tandem with the Bloodletting Knife reveals the Death Certificate, which is used to join into the Cult of Death and receive the Old Reaper's Scythe.

!!This is still in W.I.P. Bugs or unbalance is to be expected!!
